# Copilot Instructions for 3ook.com

Project guidance for AI coding agents lives in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)
at the repo root — project overview, build commands, architecture, code
conventions, and naming rules. The same instructions apply to GitHub
Copilot; please read that file first.

## Copilot-specific notes

- **Trust the instructions in `AGENTS.md`.** Only search for additional
  context when those instructions are incomplete for your task or you
  hit errors not documented there.
- **Font provider warnings** during `npm run dev` in offline or
  sandboxed environments are non-blocking — local icon collections are
  used as a fallback.
